titleStmt.title: SII 9.220: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 220. (A.R. No. 714 of 1920.) ON A BLACK GRANITE PILLAR SET UP NEAR THE DHVAJASTAMBHA OF THE ANANTABHOGESVARA TEMPLE IN KOLLUR, TENALI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged, not dated and incomplete. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. The record is in praise of the Brāhman general Anantapāla. Anantapāla is stated to be the son of Mahēśvara-Daṇḍanāyaka and his wife was Mahādēvī. His brothers Nārāyaṇa, Vāmana and Lakkaṇa are also mentioned. Since Anantapāla, the well-known general of Vikramāditya VI, figures in the record it may be assigned to the reign of that king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga maracāravē
trailō bhāya
śaṁbhavē . ya
saṁca rāja nuvā
dimadano ya ghaṭane
paṭīyase jamippu
du sata naduvē kannike
volu maṁdaragiriyiṁ
teṁkale bharatakṣē
trādhipa cakrēśvarana vaṁśāvatā
rameṁteṁdaḍe . nṛpaṁ sattamadēvaṁ vikra
māṁkanayyaṇanurvvīramaṇaṁ jayasiṁhanṛpō
ttamaniṁ trailōkyamallanāhavamalla . manamo
ldāhavamalladēvane dharitrīvallabhaṁ sōmidē
vana permmānaḍi vikramāṁkana noḷaṁbādhīśva
ra siṁgadēvane bēṁgīpati viṣṇuvardhanadharādhīśaṁ
varakīrtivarmmana rājyakkabhivṛddhiyakke śubhamakkā
caṁdratāraṁbaraṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya
śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladē
varudadhimēkhaḷāḷaṁkṛtavasundharātaḷa
maṁ bāykeḷisi duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭaprati
pāḷanamūtmi(tma)rakṣaṇaṁ dharmmayatnaveṁba
caturvvidharājanītigaḷanaḷavaḍisidarirāya
gharaṭṭa rayadikkuṁjara rāyakōḷāhaḷa
rāyasarvvasvasūṟekāṟa rāyagajakaṁṭhī
rava rāyataḷaprahari Ubhayarāya

beṁkoḷva nāya
damaged
ḍāmaṇi mā
ndhātanenisi śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēva
sthiraṁ jīyāt dhuradoḷmā
dyadgajārōhaṇapa
riṇatiyiṁdāṁpu
veṁdanyadhātrīśara
mātaṁtirkke bāhā
baḷade madagajā
rūḍhanāgirdoṁdā
nettaraleṁṭuṁ digga
jēṁdraṁgaḷanatibha
radiṁ paṇikoṁḍiṟe
baṁdēṁ bēru vaṁśādhī
śarānalu nēṟuva
redā dhuradoḷu rā
yabeṁkoḷva ninnoḷu
ninagēkachatramakke
bhuvanabhavanamī lō
kadāyuṣyamellaṁ
ninagakkanyāvanīpā
ḷakaraṁji bhayadiṁ
tamma sarvasvamaṁ te
ttu nijaśrīpādapa

dmakkeragute piriduṁ prītiyiṁ viśvadhātrī
janamaṁ dayeyiṁ
rakṣi māṁ
damaged
vinata noppida
mupamātīta bhūtaḷa
doḷ negardda Ā negarddirvvaro
ḷaṁ sēnānīpa dhātrīnuta
nenipa mahēśacamūnāyakanesedanakhi
ḷaviśvaṁbhareyoḷu . māḷevamēḷumaṁ jīdaḍi
vēḷeyapaṭṭaṇavēḷumaṁ dharāpāḷakaraḷki pēḷu
pēḷenutirppinegaṁ nijakōpapāvakajvāḷegaḷene
suṭṭu maleyēḷumanaśramadiṁde kūḍe nirmū
ḷisi kīrtiyaṁ taḷedanalte mahēśvara(daṁ)daṁḍa
nāyakaṁ . Ā vibhuvina vallabhe bhūdēvi va
cōdēvi lakṣmīdēviyenalu paṁpādēvigamamarddire paṁpā
dēvi pogartte negartteyaṁ taḷediddaḷu . Ā vadhuvuṁ vara
nuṁ nānāvidhadiṁ nōṁtu vaiṣṇavārādhaneyante
sedu māḍi paḍedaru śrīvaranene negaḻda naṁbi
daṁḍādhipanaṁ . rāyajhaḷappa vallabhana naccinabi
lkaracakramugrakhaḍgāyudhavārddāṁtūrppiḍu
va kakkaṭeyeṁbavolirdapar jayaśrīyuma
nāyumaṁ taḷedu jīyene lōkamanaṁtapāḷa nā
rāyaṇa vāmaṇapramukha lakkaṇadēvanenippa nālvaru .
Aṁtā nālvaroḷaṁ vikrāṁtadhanaṁjayananantapāḷa ni
jabhūkāṁtana maneyoḷe negaḻdaṁ kuṁtaḷanarapāḷa
rājyabharaniratiśayaṁ . Ā viprakuḷōttamana
manōvallabhe lakṣmīdēvi vāgdēvi jayaśrī(de)
dēviyenisi negaḷda mahādēvi mahāvibhū
tiyaṁ taḷadirddaḷ . Ā vadhugaṁ vibhugaviḷā

dēvakuḷōttamarenippa su
damaged
savya
sāciya pēḷalida
beṁgiyanuppinakaṭṭeymaṁ bisu
suṭṭōḍuvaḍeyaṁji kaṁcivaregaṁ
biṟudōḍi negarttegeṭṭu dōrmmada
vaḷidirda cōḷikana daḷave pēḷave sā
hasaṁkaḷa . Ēcapadaṁḍanāyaka
raneveseveḷḷapa cōḷarājyani
rmmūḷananaṁdhramaṁḍaḷikama
stakaśūḷana cakrakūṭasaṁcā
ḷana gūrjjarapraḷayakāḷananaggada
naṁtapāḷanaṁ pēḷa caḷukya
kuṁtaḷanarēṁdramahēśvaranaṁ
kakāṟanaṁ . pāḷisu kuṁtaḷā
vaniyanādaradiṁdavanaṁtapā
ḷa nirmmūḷisu gaṁgamāḷa
vamahītaḷamaṁ bhujagarvvadiṁ
de bāyēḷisu lōkamaṁ taḷedu kī
rttivadhūṭige koṭṭu diggajēṁ
drāḷikuḷācaḷaṁ jaḷadhisū
ryyaśaśāṁkare sakkiyāgi
ral . sthiranē mēruvu dāniyē
surakujaṁ gaṁbhīranē vārddhi
suṁdaranē manmathanēkavākya
yutanē satyavrataṁ sāhasō
tkaranē vāyusutaṁ dayāniratanē
dharmmātmajaṁ tānenalu dorevettiThe record stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
